name: WooCommerce MCP Server
what_it_does: WooCommerce MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with WooCommerce's e-commerce platform — managing products, orders, customers, and coupons; querying sales data and inventory; updating store settings; and integrating WooCommerce's WordPress-based e-commerce into agent-driven online store management workflows.
use_cases: Managing products and inventory from e-commerce catalog agents
Processing and updating orders from order management agents
Querying sales analytics and revenue from reporting agents
Managing customer accounts and purchase history from CRM agents
Creating and managing discount coupons from marketing agents
Monitoring low stock and inventory alerts from ops agents
not_for: Teams using Shopify, BigCommerce, or Magento for e-commerce
High-volume enterprise e-commerce (consider Shopify Plus or Magento)
best_when: An agent needs to manage a WooCommerce online store — products, orders, customers, or analytics in a WordPress-based e-commerce environment.
avoid_when: You're using Shopify, BigCommerce, or another e-commerce platform — or if you don't run WordPress.

auth.notes: WooCommerce Consumer Key and Consumer Secret for API authentication. Keys generated per WordPress user. OAuth 1.0a for non-HTTPS connections. Read-only or read/write keys available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: WooCommerce plugin: free; hosting and WordPress costs separate
pricing.paid_tiers: WooCommerce is free; extensions and plugins add cost; WooCommerce.com subscriptions available
pricing.notes: WooCommerce core plugin is free and open source. Infrastructure (WordPress hosting) costs vary. Some extensions are paid. MCP server is community open source.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted — rate limits configurable in WordPress; typically none by default

known_agent_gotchas: HTTPS required for Consumer Key auth — OAuth 1.0a available for HTTP but discouraged
WooCommerce version affects API capabilities — check version before using newer endpoints
Product variations are separate API endpoints from products — multi-step operations
Large stores with many orders/products require pagination — set per_page carefully
Webhooks must be configured in WooCommerce settings — not API-managed by default
Community MCP server — feature coverage may not include all WooCommerce endpoints
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS required for Consumer Key auth. Consumer Key/Secret pair — read or read/write. GDPR. Community MCP server. Self-hosted security is operator responsibility.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS required for auth. Consumer Key/Secret — read or read/write access. GDPR. Community MCP server. Self-hosted TLS is operator responsibility.
